entry.title: UltrafastSecp256k1 v3.14.0
entry.summary:
The email inquires about the performance of a particular technology in Hornet Node's Initial Block Download (IBD) process, specifically asking for benchmark results such as the number of signature verifications per second. This request highlights an interest in understanding the efficiency and effectiveness of the technology within a specific application area.
The sender also provides links to resources that may have been missed by the recipient. These include a detailed article on a custom constant-time, highly parallel UTXO database designed for Hornet Nodes, available at [Delving into Bitcoin](https://delvingbitcoin.org/t/hornet-utxo-1-a-custom-constant-time-highly-parallel-utxo-database/2201), and a related podcast from Bitcoin Ops discussing the technology in depth, which can be found at [Bitcoin Ops Podcast](https://bitcoinops.org/en/podcast/2026/02/10/). The inclusion of these resources suggests that there is additional background information and discussion available on the topics of interest, potentially offering insights into the query posed in the email regarding benchmarking data and performance metrics.
Overall, the email expresses a keen interest in the technical performance of a novel database solution within the context of blockchain technology, seeking empirical data to gauge its potential impact on enhancing the operational capabilities of Hornet Nodes during the IBD process.
